FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 5 free spins.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At the start of Free Spins Feature, 5 bride selections are available to be picked.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_3: 3 or 4 Scatter symbols during the Free Spins Feature's triggering game will award 2 or 3 picks respectively.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_5_Payout2_4: 5 Scatter symbols during the Free Spins Feature's triggering game will activate all 5 of the bride selections.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_7_Payout2_5: The bride selections include: "Low paying symbols removed from the reels", "All symbols are Wild symbols in the middle reel", "3 Wild symbols jumping on the reels", "All wins multiplied by x3" and "10 extra free spins awarded".
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_8_Payout2_6: After the bride selections, the free spins will be played with the additional features from the bride selections.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: The maximum win amount is %{22500}x of the bet amount.
FlirtingScholarPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{22500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

FlirtingScholarRules.Rule1_1: Flirting Scholar is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring free spins with features such as multiplier, stacked Wild symbol, jumping Wilds and removal of low paying symbols.

Rule1_2.value: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule1_2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
Rule1_2.example: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 1.0.

FlirtingScholarRules.Rule1_8: "Auto Spin" automatically plays the game for a selected number of rounds.
FlirtingScholarRules.Rule1_16: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
FlirtingScholarRules.Rule2_3: Number of picks awarded will be based on the number of Scatter symbols during the Free Spins Feature's triggering game.
FlirtingScholarRules.Rule2_6: Tap on any bride selection to reveal the feature of the free spins until there is no more picks remaining.
FlirtingScholarRules.Rule2_9: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.

FlirtingScholarPayout.Payout2_Bride1: Low paying symbols removed from reels
FlirtingScholarPayout.Payout2_Bride2: All symbols are Wild symbols in the middle reel
FlirtingScholarPayout.Payout2_Bride3: 3 Wild symbols jumping on the reels
